# Marc Hoag

> Founder, vibe coder, and California-licensed attorney since 2008.

Marc Hoag is a builder, lawyer, and maker based in Marin County, California. He builds companies, ships products, and helps AI startups move fast without breaking things legally.

## Current Projects

- Hoag Law.ai (https://hoaglaw.ai) - Fractional General Counsel for AI and SaaS startups at a flat monthly rate
- Skyriven.ai (https://skyriven.ai) - AI advisory, rapid prototyping, and vibe-coded product development
- Finnly.ai (https://finnly.ai) - Community platform for fractional finance professionals
- Saccade (https://saccadeapp.com) - iOS eye-tracking A/B testing app
- Orbital (https://getorbital.dev) - SaaS subscription management dashboard for developers
- FloodRoute (https://floodroute.com) - Real-time flood and high-tide alerts iOS app
- Scribefully (https://scribefully.com) - Content discovery and thought leadership platform
- BHBA AI and the Law (https://bhba.org/sections/ai-and-the-law/) - Inaugural Chair, Beverly Hills Bar Association

## Background

- California Bar licensed since 2008
- Founded Venturocket, a VC-backed Series A-funded jobs marketplace
- Spun out Twibble, a social media marketing tool for Twitter
- Built an autonomous vehicle-focused consultancy
- Hosted Autonomous Vehicles with Marc Hoag (2016-2023), a 200-episode podcast
